string.text:
Scorpion EVO 3 is a 9mm carbine manufactured by Česká zbrojovka Uherský Brod. The selective-fire variant is designated as A1, while the semi-automatic variant is designated as S1. The EVO 3 designation indicates that the weapon is the third generation in the CZ small submachine gun line, which began with the Skorpion vz. 61 submachine gun, though they are not mechanically related.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ACCESSORIES: 
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] NONE
